summary: AQUA is model-agnostic. It routes across multiple providers with automatic, self-healing fallback, so a single model or provider outage never takes AQUA down.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.role: Large context window and multimodal (vision) support.

routing: Every request is classified, then routed to the best-fit model. On rate-limit or failure, AQUA falls back model-by-model and then provider-by-provider, guarded by per-provider circuit breakers.

_meta.note: Model list mirrors src/providers/modelRegistry.js. Keep it in sync when you change the registry.
